endpoints.name: POST /templeton/v1/hive
endpoints.description: Submits a Hive job to an HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /templeton/v1/jobs
endpoints.description: Gets the list of jobs from the specified HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /templeton/v1/jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Gets job details from the specified HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /templeton/v1/jobs/{jobId}
endpoints.description: Initiates cancel on given running job in the specified HDInsight.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{JOBID}} with a real jobid.

endpoints.name: GET /templeton/v1/jobs?op=LISTAFTERID
endpoints.description: Gets numrecords Of Jobs after jobid from the specified HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /templeton/v1/mapreduce/jar
endpoints.description: Submits a MapReduce job to an HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /templeton/v1/mapreduce/streaming
endpoints.description: Submits a MapReduce streaming job to an HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /templeton/v1/pig
endpoints.description: Submits a Pig job to an HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /templeton/v1/sqoop
endpoints.description: Submits a Sqoop job to an HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /ws/v1/cluster/apps/{appId}/state
endpoints.description: Gets application state from the specified HDInsight cluster.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.
